SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io

Class AbstractFile

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.AbstractFile
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractVsamFile, DummyFile, SequentialFile
public abstract class AbstractFile extends Object
Abstract file class providing base methods for all N.I.B. supported file types
